base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of neon_night_riders_enemies — a character from 1991 turtles in time. Stage 8 Neon Night Riders — hover-bike futuristic enemies. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
